channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: J&K Drops Urdu Requirement for Revenue Services, Fuels Political Debate
item.description: The Jammu and Kashmir administration's recent decision to remove Urdu as a mandatory qualification for revenue services has stirred a political controversy in the region. Previously, knowledge of Urdu...

item.title: Sir Edmund Barton's letter to his nephew during WWI reveals a family connection to wartime history
item.description: When Percy Barton returned home from World War I, he brought with him a letter from his uncle, Sir Edmund Barton, Australia's first prime minister. The letter, dated 1916, offered comfort as Percy rec...

item.title: Highlights from 'It's Showtime' Laro Laro Pick: Funniest Moments with Senior Contestants
item.description: The online article from ABS-CBN Entertainment highlights some of the most hilarious and endearing moments captured during the 'Laro Laro Pick' segment of the noontime show, 'It's Showtime,' featuring ...

item.title: Spain Defies US Demands, Faces Potential NATO Suspension Over Iran War Stance
item.description: Tensions are escalating between the United States and Spain, with reports suggesting the Pentagon is contemplating suspending Spain from NATO and imposing other punitive measures. This follows Spain's...

item.title: Ndunde Investments Takes Legal Action Over Alleged Fraudulent Land Takeover in Kiambu
item.description: Ndunde Investments Limited has filed an urgent court case in Kiambu, seeking to stop an alleged fraudulent takeover of its prime land. The company claims that its property, acquired in 2000, is being ...

item.title: KCB Volleyball Ladies Settle for Silver After Strong Run at Africa Clubs Championship
item.description: KCB Volleyball Ladies gave a solid performance at the 2026 Africa Clubs Championship held in Cairo, Egypt, finishing as runners-up after losing 3-1 to Egypt’s Al Ahly in the final. The Kenyan side sta...

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz withdraws from French Open after wrist injury worsens
item.description: Carlos Alcaraz will not defend his French Open title after confirming he is withdrawing from Roland Garros due to a wrist injury. The Spanish tennis star sustained the problem during the first round o...

item.title: The Impact of Carbon Pricing Debate on Australian Climate Policy and Leadership
item.description: The debate over carbon pricing in Australia significantly affected both policy and political leadership. In the early 2000s, climate change emerged as a major concern, highlighted by the UK Stern Revi...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister to Visit Islamabad for Preparatory Peace Talks
item.description: Iran's foreign minister, Abbas Aragchi, is set to travel to Islamabad for a second round of indirect peace talks. The discussions are intended to prepare for potential engagement with the United State...

item.title: No FIR Filed Against Woman Who Confronted Minister Girish Mahajan Over Traffic Issues During BJP Rally
item.description: A woman in Mumbai, Zen Sadavarte, confronted Maharashtra minister Girish Mahajan during a BJP rally in Worli, expressing frustration over traffic congestion caused by the event. Despite the police com...

item.title: State Finals of President Federation Cup to Hold Across 35 States and FCT This Weekend
item.description: The Nigeria Football Federation (NFF) don confirm say the final matches for the state rounds of the President Federation Cup go happen for 35 states plus the Federal Capital Territory (FCT) dis coming...

item.title: Exploring Japan's Culinary Convenience: Vending Machines, Convenience Stores and Beyond
item.description: Japan has rightfully earned a global reputation for its innovative approach to everyday life, and nowhere is this more evident than in its remarkable culinary offerings. This article delves into Japan...

item.title: Ottawa Teen Found Guilty of Planning Terrorist Attack Targeting Jewish Community
item.description: An Ottawa teenager, aged 17, has been found guilty of terrorism-related charges in Ontario Superior Court for planning to attack Jewish individuals in the city. Arrested in December 2023, the youth ad...

item.title: Arteta Maintains Arsenal Confidence Despite Tight Premier League Title Race
item.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta don make am clear say him team never lose hope for the Premier League title race, even though Manchester City don overtake dem for the top of the table. City move go first...

item.title: Tinubu Appoints Darma As Minister of Housing and Urban Development
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has sworn in Muttaqha Darma as the new Minister of Housing and Urban Development in a ceremony held at the State House. Darma, from Katsina State, was confirmed by the Senate and...

item.title: Puttanna calls for using degree college professors as PhD guides to address faculty shortage in universities
item.description: Member of the Legislative Council (MLC) and former Deputy Speaker Puttanna has appealed to the Karnataka State government to permit experienced professors from first-grade degree colleges to serve as ...

item.title: Midday roundup: comedy awards, Soweto derby build-up, and inspiring graduate story
item.description: This Sowetan lunchtime feature brings together a mix of light entertainment, sport, and human interest stories for readers looking for a quick but engaging midday read. One of the highlights is a prof...

item.title: Uttarakhand YouTuber Detained for Derogatory Remarks About Saint Francis Xavier in Goa
item.description: A YouTuber from Uttarakhand, Gautam Khattar, was detained by Himachal Pradesh Police in Kullu on Friday for allegedly making derogatory comments about the Catholic saint Francis Xavier at an event in ...

item.title: World Bank Funds Spekboom Restoration Project in Eastern Cape with $120 Million Outcome Bond
item.description: A fantastic initiative is underway in the Eastern Cape, leveraging the hardy spekboom shrub to drive environmental restoration and economic opportunity. The World Bank has issued a groundbreaking $120...

item.title: Intel shares reach record high on stronger-than-expected sales forecast
item.description: Intel Corporation's shares surged to a record high after the company issued a sales forecast that exceeded Wall Street's expectations. The chipmaker projected revenue between US$13.8 billion and US$14...
